channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ghana calls for united African response to xenophobic attacks in South Africa
item.description: Ghana’s Minister of Foreign Affairs, Samuel Okudzeto Ablakwa, has called on African leaders to strongly condemn the recurring xenophobic attacks targeting West African nationals in South Africa, parti...

item.title: Essendon forward Isaac Kako sidelined with back injury, Ross Lyon addresses Indigenous players
item.description: Essendon’s promising young forward Isaac Kako has suffered a setback after scans revealed a stress injury in his back, sidelining him for a medium-term period, estimated at six to eight weeks. The 20-...

item.title: Aubrey Plaza's Relationship and Pregnancy Update
item.description: Aubrey Plaza, the well-known actress, is currently in a relationship with actor Christopher Abbot. The pair have been dating since mid-2025, shortly after Aubrey's previous husband, Jeff Baena, passed...

item.title: King Charles begins four-day US visit despite Iran tensions and press dinner incident
item.description: Britain’s King Charles and Queen Camilla are set to start a four-day visit to the United States, which is now even more significant following the recent shooting at the White House Correspondents’ din...

item.title: Kithure Kindiki Supports Viral 'Kwa Mbae' Boy with KSh 1 Million Donation
item.description: Kenyans and TikTok users came out in large numbers to show support for Musa Kihara, the boy who went viral for his 'Kwa Mbae' phrase in a video that captured his sad demeanor. The event, held at his h...

item.title: Top European clubs scout Victor Osimhen ahead of summer transfer window
item.description: As the summer transfer window dey approach, plenty big European clubs don start to dey monitor our Super Eagles talisman, Victor Osimhen. The striker, wey currently dey do wonders for Galatasaray, don...

item.title: Environmental Consequences of the Iran Conflict Across Land, Sea, and Air
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran is causing severe environmental damage that extends beyond the immediate destruction of infrastructure. Attacks on oil facilities in Tehran and other regions have released...

item.title: AAP MP denies joining BJP despite Raghav Chadha's invitation
item.description: In a recent political development, a Member of Parliament from the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) chose not to join the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), rejecting an offer extended by Raghav Chadha, a prominent B...

item.title: Two Moro men supporting police killed in Maguindanao del Norte ambush
item.description: Two Moro men, Najir Esmael and Tho Abad, were killed in an ambush while actively assisting local police operations in Barangay Bagoinged, Datu Odin Sinsuat, Maguindanao del Norte on Sunday, April 26, ...

item.title: Stormers dominate Glasgow Warriors with strategic play, says Dobson
item.description: The Stormers bounced back impressively after their previous loss to Connacht, securing a dominant 48-12 victory over Glasgow Warriors at the Cape Town Stadium. Coach John Dobson attributed the success...

item.title: Susie Wiles Schedules Meeting on Security Protocols After WHCD Shooting
item.description: Following a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner on April 25, 2026, at the Washington Hilton, White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles is convening a meeting early this week with ...

item.title: Reflecting on 32 Years of Democracy: South Africa’s Progress and Persistent Challenges
item.description: On 27 April 2026, South Africa marks 32 years of democracy since the first democratic elections of 1994. While political liberation and a progressive constitution were historic achievements, the natio...

item.title: Serbia's Pop Hor Choir Promotes Joy and Community Through Music
item.description: The Pop Hor choir, an amateur pop choir based in Serbia, has grown from a small group of local singers to a nationwide phenomenon in just four years. Founded by Nenad Azanjac and his wife in a small t...

item.title: P.E.I. oyster industry devastated by MSX and Dermo diseases
item.description: Oyster growers across western Prince Edward Island are facing unprecedented losses as the diseases MSX and Dermo continue to devastate their industry. These diseases are not harmful to humans but are ...

item.title: Pakistan Faces Economic Pressure Amid Iran Tensions and US Security Incident
item.description: Pakistan's economic outlook is facing increasing pressure due to geopolitical instability, particularly the ongoing tensions surrounding Iran and the recent shooting incident targeting Trump administr...

item.title: Understanding Toddler Tantrums and the Limits of Viral Parenting Hacks
item.description: Social media has become a double-edged sword for parents. Initially, platforms like TikTok, Facebook, and Instagram offered community, support, and practical solutions for common parenting challenges ...

item.title: CRDB Foundation Supports Over 7,000 Women Entrepreneurs in Mwanza
item.description: CRDB Bank Foundation has launched a Sh3 billion initiative to support women-owned businesses in Ilemela and across Mwanza Region. Over 7,000 women entrepreneurs have benefited so far through financial...

item.title: CJN Stresses Importance of Ethics and Integrity for Public Trust in Judiciary
item.description: The Chief Justice of Nigeria, Kudirat Kekere-Ekun, don yarn say make judges dey uphold ethical conduct, integrity, and professionalism if dem wan make Nigerians believe in judiciary. She talk am for t...

item.title: Kolmanskop: The Desert Ghost Town Slowly Reclaimed by Nature
item.description: Kolmanskop, located in southern Namibia, is a former diamond mining town that flourished briefly in the early 20th century before being abandoned. Founded after a railroad worker discovered a diamond ...

item.title: TMC MP Mitali Bag's Vehicle Damaged During West Bengal Election Campaign, Party Alleges Assault
item.description: On Monday, just before the second phase of the West Bengal Assembly elections, TMC MP Mitali Bag's car was vandalised in Arambag. According to the Trinamool Congress, the attack was carried out by BJP...
